---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## The problem

What are you trying to do that Parallel-AEO doesn't support well today?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see. If it's a new provider, analyzer, or report format,
note where it fits (`providers/`, `analysis/`, `reports/`).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Anything else

Context, examples, or references.
